description: A conceptual design team is evaluating a V-tail (butterfly tail) variant for their transport aircraft configuration. Open the existing baseline model at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 in OpenVSP. Add a new Wing component and rename it to 'VTail'. Configure this new V-tail with the following planform parameters: Total Span = 4.0 m, Root Chord = 1.2 m, Tip Chord = 0.65 m, and Leading Edge Sweep = 15 degrees. Crucially, set the section Dihedral to 38 degrees (this forms the V-shape). Position the V-tail at the aft fuselage by setting its X Location to 28.0 m and Z Location to 1.0 m. Ensure it is symmetric about the XZ plane. Save the augmented model as a new file at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_vtail_study.vsp3.
